title: Lab Title
summary: One-line description of the vulnerability this lab teaches.
goal: What the attacker is trying to achieve — the concrete objective shown in the blue 🎯 banner on every stage (simple HTML allowed).
goalSecure: Optional: the objective phrased for the fixed stage (e.g. 'try the earlier attacks — they should all be denied now'). Omit to use the default.
rootCause: One-line definition of the vulnerability (shown in the fixed-stage recap).
